name: PT BANK RAKYAT IND. RP 50
summary: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BRI) is an Indonesian bank providing banking services to micro, small and medium enterprises (MSMEs). The bank offers a wide range of products and services including loans, savings accounts, and payment services, with a focus on supporting the growth of Indonesian businesses. BRI is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
